item.name: Boreas Whistle
item.description: This whistle emits a shrill tone that is said to summon Boreas, the steed of legend.

mount.name: Boreas
mount.action: Summon forth Boreas, the legendary steed favored of the primal Shiva. His breath is said to beget the winter's storms.
mount.description: Legend states that the Lady of Frost, Shiva, birthed this magicked steed from a unicorn offered by her followers in sacrifice.
mount.tooltip:
Nay is but a hoofbeat
away from neigh!
- Uma Bugyo
